name: Arroz Con Queso
recipeIngredient: Green chili peppers, drained and seeded, chopped (4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except 1 cup of the grated cheese.
2. Pour the mixture into a well-greased Crock-Pot.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 9 hours.
4. Just before serving, sprinkle with the reserved grated cheese.
Serves 6 to 8
